# Sam Hillman

> Sam Hillman is a real-world evidence (RWE) and AI scientist working in oncology drug development, specialising in observational study design, causal inference, and agentic AI for automated evidence generation.

## Pages

- [Publications](https://samhillman.github.io/publications.llms.md)
- [CV](https://samhillman.github.io/cv.llms.md)
- [Articles](https://samhillman.github.io/articles/index.llms.md)
- [Sam Hillman](https://samhillman.github.io/index.llms.md)
